creator: loos.br@gmail.com
text:
Hello Lukasz,

I can now build pcre on -HEAD without any problem:

 # uname -a
FreeBSD raspberry-pi 10.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT #0 r255424: Tue =
Sep 10 00:35:58 BRT 2013     =
root@devel:/data/git/crochet-freebsd/work/obj/arm.armv6/data/git/crochet-f=
reebsd/src/sys/RPI-B  arm
# pkg info
dialog4ports-0.1.5_1           Console Interface to configure ports
gettext-0.18.3                 GNU gettext package
gmake-3.82_1                   GNU version of 'make' utility
m4-1.4.16_1,1                  GNU m4
pcre-8.33                      Perl Compatible Regular Expressions =
library
pkg-1.1.4_2                    New generation package manager
pkgconf-0.9.3                  Utility to help to configure compiler and =
linker flags
sudo-1.8.7_1                   Allow others to run commands as root


Can you please check if this problem is fixed for you so we can close =
this PR ?

Thanks,
Luiz=
